page.title: My loans
page.subtitle: Track status, next steps, and documents in one place.
page.inProgressSubtitle: You’re a few steps from done — pick up right where you left off.
page.completeTitle: Nice work — your application is complete
page.completeSubtitle: Next up: send us a few documents so we can move your loan forward.
page.submittedTitle: You’re all set — we’ve got it from here
page.submittedSubtitle: Follow your loan’s progress and see what happens next, all in one place.

created.title: Application submitted
created.description: Your loan officer has received everything and will reach out within one business day.

edited.title: Changes saved
edited.description: Your changes are saved and your application is now being processed. Your loan officer will review the updates and reach out if anything else is needed.

intro.title: Let’s start your loan application
intro.description: Two ways to get going — most people let our AI do the heavy lifting. You can switch anytime, and your progress saves as you go.
intro.disclaimer: Checking your rate won’t affect your credit score.

ai.title: Start with AI
ai.description: Answer a few friendly questions in chat and the assistant fills your file for you — about 3 minutes.

manual.title: Open full form
manual.description: Prefer to type it yourself? Go through the classic application at your own pace, section by section.

filter.closedEmptyDesc: Once a loan funds and closes, you’ll find it here.

card.completeDesc: Your application is complete — upload a few documents to keep things moving.
card.applicationCompleteDesc: Your loan officer is reviewing it and will reach out with next steps.
card.nextStepDesc: Takes about 2 minutes · then you’re ready to submit
card.almostDoneDesc: Just a little more to finish your application — keep going.

stepper.next: Next: your loan officer reaches out

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.quote: Closed my refinance in 18 days and beat my bank by half a point. Jordan answered every text, even on a Sunday.

reviews.name: Priya N.
reviews.quote: First-time buyer and honestly terrified. Jordan made the whole thing painless and got me a rate I did not think was possible.

reviews.name: David & Lauren R.
reviews.quote: Clear, patient, and always a step ahead. We never had to chase anyone for an update. Would recommend to anyone.

documents.title: Needed documents
documents.description: Upload what you have now so your loan officer can keep things moving — you can always add the rest later.

empty.caughtUpDesc: Every requested document has been uploaded.
empty.emptyDesc: Documents you upload will show up here.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Talk to your loan officer about this application.
messages.placeholderDescription: Questions and updates from your loan officer will show up in this thread.

docsPage.title: Let’s gather your paperwork
docsPage.subtitle: Send us a few documents so we can move your loan forward — upload at your own pace and pick up where you left off anytime.
docsPage.cardTitle: What we need from you to finish your loan
docsPage.allCaughtUpDesc: Every requested document has been uploaded.
